channel.title: SetupCarry’s Blog
channel.description: Practical buying guides for smart glasses, mobile creator gear, and tech travel accessories.

item.title: Best Smart Glasses Accessories for Travel
item.description: Build a small carry setup that protects your glasses and keeps case, cable, cloth, pads, and adapters together.

item.title: MagSafe Creator Setup for Beginners
item.description: Choose one filming problem first: desk filming, POV filming, or audio/light add-ons.

item.title: What to Pack in a Mobile Creator Tech Pouch
item.description: Organize mounting, power, cable, and care items so a mobile creator setup stays light and usable.

item.title: Smart Glasses Travel Kit Checklist
item.description: A smart glasses travel kit should be small, protective, and easy to repack.

item.title: How to Travel with Smart Glasses Without Scratching Them
item.description: A repeatable packing method that reduces lens contact, frame pressure, and dirty-cleaning risk.
